escalation.rationale: Active US-Iran war with draft peace negotiations, Ukraine striking Sevastopol with Storm Shadow missiles, and North Korea testing AI-guided cruise missiles.

ticker_items: Iran state TV reports draft US deal to reopen Strait of Hormuz
Ukraine strikes Sevastopol with UK Storm Shadow missiles
North Korea tests AI-guided cruise missiles near South Korea
Israel kills new Hamas military chief in Gaza
UK-Poland sign new security partnership treaty

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian forces struck a college facility in Starobelsk according to Russian reports
Ukrainian forces attacked Sevastopol port using British-supplied Storm Shadow missiles
Russian drone strikes reported across several Ukrainian regions

middle_east.description: Israeli strike on Gaza City killed at least 10 people including four children
Israeli air attack killed at least two people in southern Lebanon
Israeli forces killed Hamas armed wing chief Mohammed Odeh in targeted strike
Israeli strike eliminated Hamas military wing chief Mohammed Odeh
Israel stepped up attacks on Lebanon with ground forces moving further into country

ukraine.text: The next six months are critical for Ukraine to seize battlefield initiative and strengthen its position for peace talks
ukraine.speaker: Andriy Biletsky
ukraine.title: Brigadier General

middle_east.text: We committed ourselves to eliminating everyone who led the Oct 7 massacre, and that is what we will do: they are all marked for death, wherever they may be
middle_east.speaker: Israel Katz
middle_east.title: Israeli Defence Minister

middle_east.text: Iran's Revolutionary Guards said a return to war with the United States was unlikely, but warned the Islamic Republic stood ready to respond to any attack
middle_east.speaker: Revolutionary Guards
middle_east.title: Iranian Forces

observers.description: India continues negotiations with Russia for additional S-400 air defense systems despite Western sanctions. The talks follow successful deployment of five regimental sets from the original $5.4 billion deal signed in 2018.

Pakistan has deployed 8,000 troops, a fighter jet squadron, and Chinese-made air defense systems to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty. The deployment began in early April and enhances Pakistani military presence in the Gulf region.

North Korea tested AI-guided tactical cruise missiles with autonomous navigation systems and multiple weapons platforms. The tests signal advanced military modernization with potential implications for global arms transfers and regional stability.

UK signed new security partnership treaty with Poland on May 27. GCHQ chief warned Russia is attacking Europe daily through less visible means. UK supplied Storm Shadow missiles used by Ukraine against Sevastopol.
Poland signed comprehensive security and defence partnership treaty with UK, strengthening NATO's eastern flank amid Russian threats.
Putin-Xi summit demonstrated strategic alignment and diplomatic discipline. China continues backing Russia despite Western pressure, with little appetite from democracies to impose economic costs.

financial.notes: Oil jumped back to $100 per barrel following fresh US strikes, pushing UK petrol prices to highest level since 2022.

update_log.text: Iran state television reports draft memorandum of understanding with US to end war and reopen Strait of Hormuz
Ukraine strikes Russian-occupied Sevastopol with UK-supplied Storm Shadow missiles
Israel eliminates new Hamas military chief Mohammed Odeh in Gaza strike
North Korea tests AI-guided cruise missiles with autonomous navigation systems
UK and Poland sign comprehensive security and defence partnership treaty
Israeli strike on Gaza City kills 10 including four children hours after Hamas commander's funeral
Israel confirms killing of new Hamas armed wing chief Mohammed Odeh in Gaza operation
Lebanese health ministry reports 31 killed in yesterday's Israeli attacks on southern Lebanon
North Korea announces successful test of AI-guided cruise missiles with autonomous navigation
